response.justification: This candidate lacks the core technical requirements for the role. While demonstrating solid software engineering fundamentals and approximately one year of professional C++ experience, the role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development specifically on Windows platforms with strong SQL Server/Oracle expertise and capital markets domain knowledge. The candidate's entire career trajectory—spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure—shows no evidence of Windows platform development, financial services experience, or the specialized SQL/database work required for fixed-income systems. The gap is too significant for a mid-senior level position.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, and clean code practices demonstrated across multiple roles
Proven ability to lead technical infrastructure projects (GitLab, CI servers, Docker deployment) and mentor others through workshops and talks
Excellent written and verbal communication skills evidenced by public presentations, open-source contributions, and clear career documentation
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~1 year) against the mandatory requirement of 5–10 years; no evidence of Windows platform development
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or enterprise database systems; career focused on MongoDB and web technologies
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed-income, investment banking, or financial-services domain knowledge across entire career history

key_factors.factor: C++ experience duration and Windows platform gap
